overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a historic stone castle terrace with ornate columns, overlooking a vast mountainous valley under a distinctive bright cyan sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle terrace with stone columns overlooking mountain valley

agents.ego_description: Geralt of Rivia walking steadily along the castle terrace, passing stationary guards and looking out at the mountain vista

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing by the railing, looking out at the mountain view
armored figure standing near a stone pillar as Geralt passes by

entered.detail: large cylindrical stone support columns with ornate bases lining the terrace
decorative stone balustrade with arched openings overlooking the valley
distant mountain range with green slopes and valleys under the cyan sky
tall black metal torch holder with multiple arms standing on the terrace floor
bright turquoise sky with scattered white clouds visible through the columns

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a historic stone castle terrace with massive columns and arched railings. The bright cyan sky contrasts with the distant green mountains visible through the stone arches. He passes by stationary armored guards who stand watch overlooking the valley, while the camera follows smoothly from behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a historic castle terrace that gradually reveals a vast mountainous horizon. It begins with Geralt walking past massive stone columns and ornate arched railings, where the architecture frames the landscape beyond. As he advances, the camera glides smoothly behind him, passing stationary armored guards who stand watch over the valley. The scene then opens further to emphasize the contrast between the weathered stone of the terrace and the vivid green mountains set against a bright cyan sky.
